node.statement: MAT-POST-001: For finite complex matrices E, F, and G, if E^*E=I then postcomposition by E preserves the Hom-space Gram product: (E F)^*(E G)=F^*G. This is the finite-matrix forward direction of `summary.tex` §4.4 induced Hom-sector isometry (forward direction, [[def:refmap]]) after choosing orthonormal bases; it does not prove the converse separating-Hom statement or categorical Hom-sector semantics. Proven in Lean at Formalisation/LinearAlgebra/Postcompose.lean and checked by Julia/WolframScript.
